metadataRefresh.datasetDiscoveryTooltip: How often Dremio will scan the root path for new Hudi tables

elements.label: Default Record Key Field
elements.tooltip: Column used as the unique record identifier for upserts

elements.label: Default Partition Path Field (optional)
elements.tooltip: Column whose value defines the Hudi partition path

elements.label: Default Precombine Field
elements.tooltip: On upsert, the record with the highest value in this field wins

elements.label: Write Parallelism (buckets)
elements.tooltip: Number of parallel write buckets. Increase for large tables.

elements.label: Target File Size (bytes)
elements.tooltip: Target Parquet base file size. Default 134217728 = 128MB.

elements.label: Write Buffer Rows (per thread)
elements.tooltip: Rows buffered per writer thread before flushing to Hudi. Reduce for very wide rows.

elements.label: Auto-Compaction/Clustering Interval (commits, 0=disabled)
elements.tooltip: Every N commits, triggers clustering (COW) or compaction (MOR). Set 0 to disable.

elements.label: Read Batch Size (rows per Arrow batch)
elements.tooltip: Rows returned per Arrow batch during SELECT. Default 4096 matches Dremio's standard batch size.
